summary: Completed testing of 4 new features for Acuity Team Hub iteration 4. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working correctly. Fixed 1 bug in import route (missing created_by field).
critical_code_review_comments: Import route was missing created_by field when creating Item - FIXED by adding created_by=current_user['id']

All data-testid attributes properly implemented: import-dialog, import-dropzone, import-board-name, import-submit-btn, chart-tab, add-chart-btn, chart-card-{id}, chart-column-{id}, chart-type-{id}, board-name-editable, board-name-input, sidebar-new-folder-btn, new-folder-input, sidebar-import-btn
seed_data_creation: Created test boards, folders, and items during testing. All TEST_ prefixed data cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features are working correctly. Backend APIs fully functional. Frontend UI verified: 1) Import from Excel/CSV works - dialog opens, file upload works, board created with correct columns and items, 2) Folder CRUD works - create/rename/delete folders via sidebar, 3) Move board to folder works - context menu shows folder options, 4) Board rename works - click pencil icon, edit name, press Enter, 5) Chart view works - select column, chart renders with data, add multiple charts, change chart type.

passed: Backend: POST /api/import/excel with CSV file creates board with correct columns and items
Backend: POST /api/import/excel with XLSX file creates board
Backend: POST /api/folders with workspace_id creates folder
Backend: DELETE /api/folders/{id} deletes folder and removes folder_id from boards
Backend: PUT /api/folders/boards/{boardId}/move?folder_id={folderId} moves board to folder
Backend: PUT /api/boards/{id} with {name: 'New Name'} renames board
Frontend: Login -> home page -> click Import Board card -> import dialog opens with dropzone
Frontend: Import dialog has file dropzone, board name input, and submit button
Frontend: Sidebar shows folder icon button -> click -> type name -> creates folder
Frontend: Board in sidebar has context menu to move into folder
Frontend: Login -> navigate to board -> click board title -> inline edit appears -> type new name -> Enter saves
Frontend: Board page -> Chart tab -> shows chart builder -> select column -> chart renders
Frontend: Chart view -> add chart button -> new chart added -> select column and chart type

bug_fixed.issue: Item model requires created_by field but import route was not providing it
bug_fixed.fix: Added created_by=current_user['id'] to Item constructor in import_from_excel function
